performers.title: 🚀 Water on Mars: The Vanishing Act
performers.hook: Pour water on Mars and it vanishes
performers.script: Pour water on Mars and it vanishes. Thin atmosphere, low pressure. Water boils instantly, then freezes. On Venus, it's crushed by pressure. On Jupiter, it's lost in gas. But what happens to water on other planets? Pour water on Mars and it vanishes

performers.title: 🌌 Poisonous Skies Revealed
performers.script: Trapped in a poisonous sky. Toxic gases surround. No oxygen, no life. Acid rain falls, sulfuric mist. Lungs dissolve, skin burns. The atmosphere is a killer. Trapped in a poisonous sky

performers.title: 🚀 Sound in Space = Death? 🚫
performers.hook: Hear a sound in space and it kills
performers.script: Hear a sound in space and it kills. Sound waves propagate, pressure builds. Eardrums rupture, lungs collapse. In vacuum, sound is deadly. Hear a sound in space and it kills

performers.title: 🌊 Lost City Beneath the Waves
performers.script: City swallowed by the sea. Ancient metropolis hidden. Beneath Mediterranean waves, ruins lie. Temples, theaters, and towers, submerged for millennia. The question remains: what secrets do the ruins of Thonis-Heraklion still hold? City swallowed by the sea

performers.title: 🌟 Creatures That Light The Dark 🌟
performers.script: Glowing creatures light the dark. Deep ocean, no sunlight. Bioluminescent beasts thrive. Anglerfish lure prey, glowing spots shine. Giant squid glow to hide, to hunt. The darkest depths are lit. By creatures that produce their own light. Glowing creatures light the dark.
